mapper.select: SELECT id, `order-id`, `user-id`, score, content, photo, `create-time` FROM t_order_comment ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
SELECT id, `order-id`, `user-id`, score, content, photo, `create-time` FROM t_order_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, `order-id`, `user-id`, score, content, photo, `create-time` FROM t_order_comment WHERE `order-id` = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_comment (`order-id`, `user-id`, score, content, photo, `create-time`) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{photo}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order_comment SET score = #{score}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
